files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env bash
+# user-prompt.sh — UserPromptSubmit hook (async)
+# Appends a user_input ConversationItem to cxdb.
+set -euo pipefail
+
+source "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib.sh"
+resolve_cxdb_url
+
+input=$(cat)
+session_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.session_id')
+context_id=$(get_context_id "$session_id")
+[ -z "$context_id" ] && exit 0
+
+user_prompt=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.user_prompt // ""')
+# synthetic is a bool in the payload (or absent); default false
+synthetic=$(echo "$input" | jq '.synthetic // false')
+ts=$(now_ms)
+
+payload=$(jq -n \
+  --arg text "$user_prompt" \
+  --argjson synthetic "$synthetic" \
+  --argjson ts "$ts" \
+  '{
+    "type_id": "cxdb.ConversationItem",
+    "type_version": 3,
+    "data": {
+      "item_type": "user_input",
+      "status": "complete",
+      "timestamp": $ts,
+      "user_input": {
+        "text": $text,
+        "synthetic": $synthetic
+      }
+    }
+  }')
+
+cxdb_append "$context_id" "$payload"
+exit 0
